markdown:
# Durable

You gain the following benefits.

## Defy Death

You have [[advantage]] on [[death_saving_throw Saving Throws]].

## Speedy Recovery

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can expend one of your [[hit_point_dice Point Dice]], roll the die, and regain a number of [[hit_points Points]] equal to the roll.
